evals.name: trigger-data-table-pagination
evals.prompt: Build an admin users table with server-side pagination, sorting, and edit/delete action buttons.

assertions.text: Defines a headers array with title, key, sortable properties
Implements v-model:options and passes items-length for the total count
Uses a custom #item.actions slot for edit/delete buttons

evals.name: trigger-pagination-control
evals.prompt: How do I add standalone pagination controls computed from a total item count?

assertions.text: Uses v-pagination with v-model and :length set to the total pages
Computes totalPages from totalItems and itemsPerPage

evals.name: negative-card-list
evals.prompt: Create a card that shows a skeleton loader while data loads then renders a list.

assertions.text: Does NOT trigger vuetify-data; routes to vuetify-components instead
